name: BLVD Forty Four
approxRentRange: $3,124 to $4,430/mo for 2BR (2BR starts at $3,243; 2BR+Den starts at $3,504)
bathroomsNote: 2BR units have 2 full baths; 2BR+Den also 2 baths
balconyNote: Available in select units only, not standard on every floor plan
inUnitLaundryNote: Building amenities page lists 'in-home washer and dryer' as a standard feature
petFriendlyNote: Cats and dogs; max 2 pets, 75 lb combined weight; 23 restricted breeds including Pit Bulls, Rottweilers, German Shepherds
gymNote: 24-hour fitness center with yoga and TRX studios
unitClimateNote: No source addresses whether thermostats are per-unit or building-controlled
wellMaintainedNote: Multiple review sources describe the building as very well maintained; concierge and maintenance staff receive consistent praise for responsiveness
